title: elaphoglossum obtusum
intro: Elaphoglossum obtusum, also known as the obtuse elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Elaphoglossum obtusum is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum obtusum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
